overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage featuring a character in tactical armor with a red mask standing under an art deco bus shelter in a rainy, neon-lit urban environment at night. The character surveys the surroundings before walking out into the wet streets, with steam rising from vents and street lamps casting warm glows on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus shelter on rainy city street

events.description: character turns from facing the street to facing the camera

agents.ego_description: standing under the bus shelter, turning to survey the area behind while rain falls outside

entered.detail: ornate bronze and glass shelter structure with geometric patterns and a hexagonal hanging sign
steam rising from a vent or manhole cover in the wet street ahead
red and white striped traffic barrel on the sidewalk edge
tall street lamp casting warm yellow light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The character stands under an ornate art deco bus shelter as rain falls on the city street. Steam rises from a vent in the road ahead, and traffic barrels line the sidewalk. The character turns to face the camera, revealing the detailed shelter interior with its bronze geometric patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior wall of art deco bus shelter

events.description: character stops facing camera and begins walking along the shelter wall toward the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the interior wall of the bus shelter, passing an illuminated advertisement poster

entered.detail: illuminated green advertisement poster with text mounted on the shelter wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the interior wall of the shelter, passing a glowing green advertisement poster. The shelter structure moves to the left of the frame as the character progresses, with the rainy street visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk transitioning from covered shelter to open street

events.description: character walks out from under the bus shelter into the open rainy street

agents.ego_description: walking out from the bus shelter into the open street, moving away from the covered area into the rain

entered.detail: tall historic stone building facade with illuminated windows visible as the character exits the shelter
leafless tree on the sidewalk near the building

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shelter and steps into the open street, with rain now falling directly. A historic stone building and bare tree become visible on the left, while the bus shelter recedes into the background. Steam continues to rise from a vent on the right as the character moves deeper into the wet urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered interior of an art deco bus stop into the open, rain-drenched urban street. It begins with the character standing beneath the ornate bronze geometric patterns of the shelter as steam rises from a nearby road vent and rain falls around them. As the character turns and walks along the interior wall, the camera tracks their movement past a glowing green advertisement poster while the shelter structure gradually shifts to the left of the frame. The scene then opens up as the character steps out from under the canopy and into the direct rainfall, leaving the shelter to recede into the background. Finally, the view expands to reveal a historic stone building and a bare tree on the left, with the character moving deeper into the wet environment past another steaming vent.
